chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Skyvern-AI/skyvern release v1.0.8, the team addressed old credential accessibility, added an OLLAMA_SUPPORTS_VISION environment variable, saved LLM prompt and response artifacts in TextPromptBlock, fixed conditional logic, hydrated workflow run responses with workflow titles, supported extension choice in pbs, fixed empty browser extension bugs, added LLM-safe context to conditional NL branch evaluation, updated tooltips and placeholders for conditional blocks, updated API specifications, stored masked values for secret input actions in caching, fixed local variable errors, added a Start VNC Streaming Script, used GitHub flavored markdown for Readme emphasis, downgraded noisy logs to debug, removed codeflash, bumped frontend dependencies, returned clear 400 for missing required workflow params, initialized string parameters without defaults as empty strings, populated close_browser_on_completion in cleanup, fixed ID generation uniqueness, added secret storage in Azure, updated data center proxies, fixed a dependency, fixed scrolling action, cached get_workflow_script_by_cache_key_value query and re-enabled post action execution code generation, added PH proxy option, introduced per-action credit consumption billing, fixed FileParserBlock decoding errors, fixed wrong screenshot, and delivered the backend side of the first version of Workflow Copilot.

Repository: Skyvern-AI/skyvern
Release: v1.0.9

Release notes:
## What's Changed
* decrease max svg parsing by @LawyZheng in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4430

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Skyvern-AI/skyvern release v1.0.9, the team decreased max SVG parsing, improved join query performance by adding organization_id to workflow_scripts and scripts table joins, loosened websockets dependency for Copilot, added OpenAI GPT-5 mini flex model support, passed boolean and integer template values in HTTP Block for Centria, used get_llm_handler_for_prompt_type in Workflow Copilot, enabled streaming in /chat-post for Workflow Copilot, supported downloading files via HTTP Calls for Centria, refactored workflow YAML conversion and persisting, added an "Execute on Any Outcome" (Finally) option to blocks, added help tooltips for Bitwarden and Azure Vault credential types, updated Workflow Copilot knowledge base, extracted PersistentSessionsManager protocol, added clipboard copy functionality over HTTP, hid billing endpoints in Fern docs, used STANDARD tier for small S3 objects, added a "Print PDF" Block, applied various small fixes to Workflow Copilot, added server update streaming with cancel ability for Workflow Copilot, implemented persistent browser session uptime cost metering and PostHog flags for billing v2, optimized secret value input, fixed login block credential selection, synced parameter key renames and deletions to all block types, used default value when workflow parameter is explicitly set to null in API requests, converted YAML to workflow definition on the backend for Workflow Copilot, fixed a task v2 bug where it kept going back to the original URL, validated all block parameters are defined in workflow, made proxy saving and UX fixes, enabled searching runs by wr_xxx on backend and frontend, required credential on runs with login block, and fixed 'UrlBlockYAML' object has no attribute 'parameter_keys'.

* Add block labels validation in run_blocks by @stanislaw89 in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4500
* Fix Gemini 3 Flash cache creation and false fallback detection by @pedrohsdb in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4502

* Return 409 on workflow updates race conditions by @stanislaw89 in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4510
* browser sessions v2 - backend by @noqcks in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4515
* general text captcha solution by @LawyZheng in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4517
* retry otp webhook call by @LawyZheng in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4518

* remove credential value type from input parameter dropdown by @celalzamanoglu in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/4522

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/compare/v1.0.9...v1.0.10
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Skyvern-AI/skyvern release v1.0.10, the team added block labels validation in run_blocks, fixed Gemini 3 Flash cache creation and false fallback detection, introduced LLM-based YAML autocorrection for Workflow Copilot, stored screenshot artifacts and generated URLs when needed, cleaned up block output and parameter references when blocks/parameters are renamed or deleted, checked Bitwarden itemid format, removed Fern icon from generated readme, returned 409 on workflow updates race conditions, implemented browser sessions v2 backend, added a general text captcha solution, retried OTP webhook calls, showed affected blocks in confirmation dialog when deleting blocks or parameters, removed credential value type from input parameter dropdown, and cached tiktoken.

integration lock files, updating API specifications, addressing Minerva timing attack on P-256 in python-ecdsa, gating script reviewer on actual script execution, restricting managed storage URI reads by organization, strengthening login test prompt and removing max_steps cap, adding logging for scheduled workflows, adding PostHog custom events for builder interactions, teaching script reviewer to handle blank page errors with wait calls, limiting schedules created by tier, forcing ai_fallback=True for adaptive caching runs, adding live view link in credential testing UI, replacing saved-profile badge with save icon, fixing for_loop script generation to use loop_over parameter key, improving conditional prompt for jinja+natlang consistency, improving reCAPTCHA/hCaptcha solving with prompt fix and proactive detection, guarding scroll_to_top/scroll_to_next_page against non-numeric JS returns, bundling artifacts to reduce S3 objects, fixing Python dependency vulnerabilities, preventing settings page crash for self-hosted Docker builds, reading removed commits, reverting MiniMax LLM provider support, removing broken effective_browser_session_id suppression, fixing CodeBlock sandbox by removing asyncio and blocking dangerous attrs, preventing settings page crash for self-hosted users, adding workflow runs links from scheduler pages, collapsing Upcoming Runs card when schedule is paused, hardening Workflow Copilot against prompt injection, replacing page.wait_for_timeout with asyncio.sleep to avoid CDP detection, and fixing exponential backoff for workflow run Version bumped from 1.0.28 to 1.0.27

* remove non-partial indexes by @wintonzheng in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/5226

* Add execution mode log at workflow run start by @pedrohsdb in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/5238
* docs: full documentation redesign with new content, screenshots, and navigation by @naman06dev in https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/pull/5235
